task: Find the race time for who wins the first place in the last race of the 2023 Formula 1 (F1).
final_result_response: The last race of the 2023 Formula 1 season was the **Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi GP** at Yas Marina Circuit (November 24-26, 2023). The first-place winner was **Max Verstappen** (Red Bull) with a race time of **1:27:02.624**.
